description_long: This object features a robust cylindrical central column supporting a thick, rectangular slab at the top, resembling a heavy-duty industrial table or platform. Underneath the slab, a complex network of metal pipes, valves, and gauges is arranged symmetrically, with two prominent wire-caged light fixtures hanging down. The pipes are joined with multiple fittings and elbows, and some have red valve handles, suggesting manual control points. The surface of the slab appears to be made of concrete or stone, with a weathered, matte finish, while the pipes and column are dark, likely metallic, and show signs of industrial wear. The overall construction is solid and utilitarian, with exposed hardware and functional design elements. No visible warning signage or electrical insulators are present, and the equipment appears to be more mechanical than electrical.
description: A heavy cylindrical column supports a thick, rectangular slab, with a network of pipes, valves, and caged lights suspended below. The structure is industrial, with a weathered concrete top and dark metal components.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full width of the slab, the central column, and the symmetrical arrangement of pipes and caged lights beneath.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the narrow profile of the slab and the cylindrical base, with pipes and lights partially visible in silhouette.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, displaying the slab, column, and the back side of the pipe network and caged lights.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the narrow slab and column, with the caged lights and pipes visible from a different angle.
attribute_arrangement_of_crossarms: There is a single, thick horizontal slab at the top, supported by a central column, with no visible crossarms or tiered arrangements.
attribute_configuration_of_attached_powe: No power lines are visibly attached; the structure is self-contained with only internal piping and lighting.
